articles.title: Will Scotland play a third World Cup match at Boston Stadium? The odds are looking good.
articles.description:
Boston is already saying a mournful goodbye to the Tartan Army. But the math says that Scotland could very well be playing another game in Foxborough later this month.

The post Will Scotland play a third World Cup match at Boston Stadium? The odds are looking good. appeared first on Boston.com.
